name: Wound Treatment
shortDescription: Professional wound care, cleaning, suturing, and dressing for cuts, lacerations, and skin injuries.
fullDescription: Our Wound Treatment service provides professional care for all types of wounds, from minor cuts and abrasions to more complex lacerations requiring suturing. Our medical team ensures proper wound cleaning, debridement, closure, and dressing to prevent infection and promote optimal healing. We also provide follow-up care and wound monitoring to ensure proper recovery.
